role: This directory serves as the root configuration and structural definition hub for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: It collectively defines foundational configuration, architectural rules, and structural roles for the .spine directory, provides demonstration assets and project overview documentation, and aggregates core source code layers including API, domain, and infrastructure components to deliver a complete application logic stack.
